titleStmt.title: SII 26.704: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 704. (A.R. No. 656 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged at the end. It refers to the king as ‘who took the head of Vīrapāṇḍya, the head of the Chēraṉ, Ilaṅkai (Laṅkā-Ceylon), and the 7(1/2)-lakh Iraṭṭapāḍi, and who had got annointed at ‘Kalliyāṇapuram’.

It records a gift of a sandhi lamp and a sum of 3 kāśu to provide for it, by a certain Māḍalaṉ Tirumāliruñjōlai Śīkārimāṟan of Tirunallam, to the temple of the god Śī-Karikālaśōḻa-viṇṇagar Āḻvār of the same place. It is stated that three persons named Vaikā[ṉa]saṉ Bhārggavaṉ, Śaruppēdi Śrīkṛishṇaṉ, his younger brother Sū(r)yyaṉ Appiramēyaṉ and Nārāyaṇaṉ Kṛishṇaṉ received the gift amount and had agreed to burn the lamp from out of the interest thereof.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī pā]
ṇṭiyaṉ talaiyu
m ceralaṉ talaiyum
Ilaṅkaiyum Ira
ṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai I
lakkamum koṇṭu
kalliyāṇapurat
tu vijaiyabhiṣe
hañceytu virasiṅhā
saṉattu viṟṟiru
n=taruḷiya korāca
kecaripanmarāṉa Uṭai
yār śrī vijaiya
rājentradevarkku
yāṇṭu 3 10 4 Āva
tu Uyyakkoṇṭā
r vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇā
ṭṭu brahmateyam ti
runallattu vaikāṉa
saṉ bhārggavaṉ ca
ruppeti śrīgraṣṇanu
m Ivaṉ tampi sū
ryyaṉ Appirame
yaṉu nārāyaṇaṉ
kṛṣṇaṉum I
m muvom cikarikālacoḻa
viṇṇakar Āḻvārkku Oru can=ti
viḷakku Erikkak kaṭavomāka
Ivvūr māṭalaṉ tirumāliruñco
lai cikārimāṟan niṭai nāṅkaḷ
koṇṭa kācu 3 Ikkācu muṉṟukku
policai cekuttu cantirātival In
nayinārku Erikkakaṭavomākavum In=taśrī
koyil kāṇi Eṅkaḷiṭai vilai
koṇṭārum Oṟṟikoṇṭārum tā
ṉam koṇṭārum stritaṉam peṟṟārum
sa Damaged after this.
Digital edition of SII 26.704 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
